module_info.docstring: Tests for EvaluationResult methods in problem.py.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_with_improvement
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when score improves over parent.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_with_regression
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when score is worse than parent.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_with_no_change
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when score is same as parent.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_with_no_rounded_change
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when score is within rounding error of parent.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_without_parent
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when parent result is None.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_non_viable
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when organism is not viable.

functions.name: test_format_observed_outcome_non_viable_without_parent
functions.docstring: Test format_observed_outcome when organism is not viable and no parent.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_single
functions.docstring: Test sampling a single failure case.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_same_type
functions.docstring: Test that all sampled failure cases have the same failure_type.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_empty
functions.docstring: Test sampling when there are no trainable failure cases.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_batch_size_exceeds_available
functions.docstring: Test that batch_size is capped by available failure cases of the same type.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_multiple_types
functions.docstring: Test sampling with multiple failure types.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_single_failure_case
functions.docstring: Test sampling when there's only one failure case.

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_uniqueness
functions.docstring: Test that sampled failure cases are unique (no duplicates).

functions.name: test_sample_trainable_failure_cases_holdout_not_included
functions.docstring: Test that holdout failure cases are not included in sampling.
